author: gaxanh
content: After reviewing 8038, I noticed that gas reimbursements for state access/update operations were not being allocated properly. All costs except STORAGE_CLEAR_REFUND are created within the same transaction, so we need to rearrange them in a logical way.  My proposal is to add a separate reservoir, with all refunds added to this reservoir, and all state access operations using this reservoir before using gas_left. This model is similar to the 8037's state_gas_reservoir. Would this significantly complicate the implementation? What do you think? <@968526635735326741>
